The gather identifies untested sample-rate gflag validators and transactional dynamic flag update branches. Those are configuration correctness paths, so the missing assertions are a real adherence gap that should block merge.

The gather identifies missing coverage for EmbeddedConfig sample-rate setters accepting valid values and rejecting invalid values before parse. That leaves new configuration behavior unverified, which is a substantive test gap.
